query: I have a really itchy red rash on my arms that won't go away
my chest hurts and my heart feels like it's racing
my 4 year old has been pulling at his ear and crying all night
I keep getting these terrible migraines almost every week
my vision has gotten really blurry over the past few months
I think I broke my ankle playing basketball yesterday
I've been feeling really depressed and anxious lately and nothing helps
I sneeze constantly during spring and my eyes water like crazy
I need to schedule my annual physical and update my vaccines
my wife is pregnant and we need prenatal care
my hands have been really stiff in the mornings and my knuckles look swollen
I've lost a lot of weight without trying and I'm always thirsty
I have heartburn every night and sometimes food comes back up
my husband snores so loud and stops breathing in his sleep
there's blood in my urine and it burns when I pee
I keep getting sinus infections like 5 times a year
my dad is 82 and getting confused, falling a lot, and on like 9 medications
the bottom of my heel kills me every morning when I get out of bed
my husband and I have been trying to have a baby for 2 years
I had a stroke last year and I'm still trying to get my arm working again
I came back from a trip to southeast asia and I've had fevers on and off for weeks
my legs cramp and hurt really bad when I walk more than a block
my eyes look yellow and my skin is itchy all over
I had an abnormal pap smear and they found something on my ovary
I bruise really easily and bleed forever from tiny cuts
I'm so tired all the time, my hair is falling out, and I've gained weight
I have this dull ache in my upper back that's been going on for months and sometimes I feel short of breath
my joints hurt everywhere, I'm exhausted, and I have weird rashes that come and go
I get dizzy spells and sometimes the room spins for a few seconds
I had a c-section 3 weeks ago and the incision is red, hot, and oozing
